channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: $14k mistake: simple code beats fancy stacks
item.description: Cut API latency 66% and AWS costs 63% by removing Redis, Kafka, and over-engineered patterns — the real cost of premature abstraction and how to avoid it.

item.title: Vibe coding vs production reality
item.description: Python scripts gone 3am: test with 98% coverage, and even added Open. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Burn $47k on microservices?
item.description: Monoliths beat microservices in 2026: latency, cost, and MTTR benchmarks for startups, solo devs, and bootstrappers — real numbers, real stacks.

item.title: Vector DB vs Postgres 16: the 300ms cut that matters
item.description: Cut vector search latency 40% using Postgres 16 + pgvector 0.7.0 instead of a dedicated DB—benchmark, filters, and the exact commands to measure right now.

item.title: Cache Showdown: Which One Survives the Spike
item.description: Cut API latency 60% with Memcached 1.6.22 — benchmark shows p99 under load and the one tuning knob that matters. Compare Redis 7.2’s data structures vs Memcached’s simplicity for production traffic.

item.title: MCP servers demystified for developers
item.description: Cut API response time 70% with an MCP server — Python mcp 1.13.0, fastmcp 0.8.0, and the 3 mistakes every team makes first.

item.title: Tune your pool size or waste CPU cycles
item.description: Save 40% CPU by shrinking your pool — PostgreSQL connection sizing myths debunked with 2026 benchmarks and a new formula based on concurrency, not max_connections

item.title: 3 AI system patterns that work in 2026
item.description: Achieve 84% cost savings and 0.4% error rates in AI-first systems with idempotent actions, write-through cache, and state machines — the boring patterns that survive 2026.

item.title: 3 LLM metrics your pipeline ignores
item.description: at’s only 30% of the picture. The other 70% with LLMs — be a single misconfigured timeout — this post is wh.

item.title: Slay API rate limits without 429s
item.description: Cut API 429 errors 99% with adaptive rate limiting — per-client burst growth, Redis leaky bucket, and Retry-After headers that clients actually follow.

item.title: Zero-trust for 5-person teams: skip the bloat
item.description: Cut security overhead 70% with minimal zero-trust for 5-person teams — SSH certificates, short-lived tokens, and immutable logs that actually work in production.

item.title: RAG pipelines: why speed kills at scale
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 82% and infra costs 49% — the real bottlenecks, cache keys, and deduplication layer most tutorials skip. Learn the production metrics that matter in 2026.

item.title: Build fast APIs that clear $4k/month remote
item.description: Ship a $4k/month-ready API in 2026: Redis caching, Sentry error tracking, and load tests that prove stability. The real stack developers in Nairobi and Lagos use to keep remote roles.

item.title: Edge functions: the latency lie we still tell users
item.description: Cut API latency by 59ms for APAC users with edge functions — when Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge actually make sense, failure modes, and code examples for 2026 budgets.

item.title: Senior without CS degree: how I proved the myth wrong
item.description: that only 38% of professional developers ho with CS degree Ship senior — a computer science degree.

item.title: Tame cellular timeouts before your P99 burns
item.description: Cut mobile P99 latency from 8.2 s to 720 ms: TCP_NODELAY, TFO, DoQ, and pool sizing for 5G networks — real Ookla 2026 traces and FastAPI code

item.title: Multi-agent systems: the production trap nobody
item.description: Cut agent round-trip latency from 140ms to 42ms in production systems — connection pooling, TLS overhead, and the 10ms hop budget nobody mentions

item.title: AI sprints: how to measure if it's helping or hurting
item.description: y went up 15%. The CEO wanted to double the with AI sprints measure helping — double the budget.

item.title: Codebase Graphs: AI Sees What You Miss
item.description: Cut PR review time 42% with repository intelligence — Cody Graph, symbol graphs, and the context tools that actually work in 2026

item.title: Multi-tenant databases: the schema mistake everyone
item.description: Cut cross-tenant query latency from 4.2s to 80ms with a single-table design and RLS — schema-per-tenant and separate databases are overkill for most SaaS stacks
